prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低位次分别约为16077→14087→14186→16267→18465名，整体呈先升后降再大幅后移的波动趋势；2025年基准约18465名，较2024年大幅 后移约2200名，为近5年最低水平；该校在北京市综合类招生计划2021–2025年均为3人，2026年仍为3人，招生规模连续6年持平，无扩招或 缩招变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 四川农业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第134名，近年排名从2021年第162名持续上升至2026年第134名，学校综合实 力稳步提升；2023年声誉评价偏正面（食堂服务好、宿舍有自习室）；2022年曾出现投档线逐年下降信号（中关注）；抖音热度总排名第86位，评价为一般，短 视频平台曝光量处于中等偏下水平，未出现明显报考热度升温信号；畜牧学获评A级、作物学获评A-，为该校核心优势学科；招生专业动物医学对应兽医学（A- ）、环境工程对应环境科学与工程（A-），学科基础扎实。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 动物医学、环境工程相关专业大类热度平稳，无明显升温或降温信号；北京市2026年高考报名 总人数约84900人，较2025年65434人增加约29.7%，考生规模大幅增长，竞争显著加剧；四川农业大 学位于四川省成都市，距北京市较远，属于跨省就读；该校在全国招生总量较大，但在北京市招生人数极少（仅3人），本地考生报考意愿受地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势、2026年招生计划持平但北京市考生总数大幅增加约30%导致竞争加剧、学校软科排名稳步上升带来的吸引力增强，以及声誉热度平稳等因素， 预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年18465名基础上继续小幅后移；预测最低位次约18665名，区间18165–19165名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 该校在北京市仅投放2个专业共3个计划，招生规模极小。位次在预测区间18165–19165名内建议以动物医学为冲刺目标、环境工程为稳妥选择；位次明显优于区间下限（低于1816 5名）可重点冲刺动物医学专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Beijing Comprehensive category were approximately 16077 → 14087 → 14186 → 16267 → 18465, showing a trend of first rising, then falling, and then significantly dropping; the 2025 baseline is about 18465, a substantial drop of about 2200 positions compared to 2024, the lowest in the past 5 years; the enrollment plan for this university in Beijing Comprehensive category was 3 students from 2021 to 2025, and remains 3 in 2026, with the enrollment scale unchanged for 6 consecutive years, no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University Ranking is approximately 134th in 2026, with a continuous rise from 162nd in 2021 to 134th in 2026, indicating steady improvement in overall strength; the reputation evaluation in 2023 was relatively positive (good cafeteria service, dormitories with study rooms); in 2022, there was a signal of declining admission scores (medium concern); Douyin heat ranking is 86th overall, rated as average, with short video platform exposure at a medium-low level, no obvious signs of rising application heat; Animal Husbandry is rated A-level, Crop Science is rated A-, as core advantageous disciplines; the enrollment major Veterinary Medicine corresponds to Veterinary Science (A-), Environmental Engineering corresponds to Environmental Science and Engineering (A-), with solid disciplinary foundations.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of major categories such as Veterinary Medicine and Environmental Engineering is stable, with no obvious signs of warming or cooling; the total number of Beijing college entrance examination applicants in 2026 is about 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% compared to 65,434 in 2025, with a significant increase in candidate numbers and intensified competition; Sichuan Agricultural University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, far from Beijing, requiring cross-province study; the university has a large total enrollment nationwide, but very few in Beijing (only 3 students), so local candidates' willingness to apply is limitedly affected by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant drop in rankings in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026 but a substantial increase of about 30% in Beijing candidates leading to intensified competition, the steady rise in Soft Science rankings enhancing attractiveness, and stable reputation heat, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to slightly drop from the 2025 level of 18465; predicted minimum ranking is about 18665, with a range of 18165–19165.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: This university only offers 2 majors with a total of 3 slots in Beijing, with an extremely small enrollment scale. For rankings within the predicted range of 18165–19165, it is recommended to aim for Veterinary Medicine as a reach goal and Environmental Engineering as a safe choice; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (below 18165), focus on reaching for Veterinary Medicine.
